parsed.production_notes: Both characters exhibit typical AI-generated traits: overly smooth skin, slightly unnatural lip-sync, and stiff, repetitive micro-expressions. The split-screen format with static backgrounds is also a common AI video template.

characters.appearance: Young woman, fair complexion, blonde bob hair. Symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Beige blazer over a white top, delicate gold necklace.

characters.appearance: Young woman, tanned complexion, short curly brown hair. Prominent eyes and cheekbones.
characters.wardrobe: Black spaghetti strap top, gold hoop earrings, layered gold necklaces.

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up shot of Character A facing the camera directly. She is positioned in the center of the frame. The background is a brightly lit, blurred indoor space, possibly an office or modern apartment, with indistinct shapes and light sources. The lighting on her face is soft and even.

A close-up shot of Character B facing the camera directly. She is centered in the frame. The background is a blurred, slightly darker indoor setting with warm, muted tones. The lighting on her face highlights her features, with soft shadows adding depth.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with Character A on top and Character B on the bottom. Both characters are engaged in a conversation, looking directly at the camera as if speaking to each other. Speech bubbles appear next to them, displaying their dialogue. A logo is visible in the top left corner.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: That movie was amazing, right?
Character B says: Yes, I am agree!
Character A says: Do you mean I agree?
Character B says: Wait, no "am"?
Character A says: Nope — "agree" is already a verb. We just say I agree.
Character B says: Got it. I agree to practice more!
Character A says: Perfect.
Character B says: I wish someone corrected me like that every time.
Character A says: I can! I'm an AI tutor in Fluently.
Character B says: Really?
Character A says: Yes, we can talk every day, and I'll help you sound more natural.
Character B says: That's great! Let's talk again tomorrow.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid, dark purple gradient background. The color transitions smoothly from a slightly lighter shade in the center to darker edges. There are no objects, characters, or distinct shapes present.
